tagline: Boutique wellness micro-resort development in Costa Rica
description: Design-led, feminine-aesthetic, wellness-integrated hospitality at the 5–12 villa scale.

workspace_cards.name: Foundation
workspace_cards.gate_question: Do we understand the structural forces, constraints, and dynamics of this industry well enough to identify real problems within it?
workspace_cards.summary: Costa Rica's boutique wellness hospitality has structural friction (cantonal fragmentation, capital scale gap, information asymmetry, commoditization risk for non-moated entrants, climate gating) and clear status-quo defenders (ICT growth ceiling, mid-60% national occupancy).

workspace_cards.name: Problem
workspace_cards.gate_question: Do we understand the problem and its causal mechanisms?
workspace_cards.summary: First-time long-haul wellness travelers to Costa Rica systematically fail to develop property-level repeat-visit relationships because the structural pre-booking information environment cannot align Pura Vida promise with on-the-ground delivery — producing predictable expectation-reality gaps that drive one-and-done outcomes.
